blog_title: 7 Best Things To Do In Bali For Honeymooners
seo_title: 7 Best Things To Do In Bali For Honeymooners
description: Discover the ultimate travel packing list for every adventure. Pack smart, light, and stress-free with essential tips .
body_content:
Published by travelxploria on Tue Jun 17 2025

If you have got hitched recently and searching for a good honeymoon destination, consider Bali tour. It’s the ideal place for all romantic couples. Other than beaches, there are dense forests, lush green paddy fields, tropical rainbow shores, and more. Natural beauty is further combined with the richness of culture and heritage.
Wishing to spend some private time with each other away from the world, Bali can be your paradise.
How to have the best time of your life in Bali when you just got married
By consulting a top-rated travel agency and fixing a date sometime in March or October, you must do the following activities mentioned below to make some beautiful and unforgettable memories in Bali.

If you guys love to do adventures together, start your day with the Bali swings. It’s best if you are a daredevil couple. You can feel the chills running down your spine as you swing over the 78m high forest swings. You are guaranteed to forget sports such as deep ocean diving and sky-diving once both of you go for this one. It’s super thrilling, exciting, and something that you remember all your life~!

Watching the sunset at Tanah Lot temple together will be nothing but absolute bliss. There are many couples who go there. While some prefer covering all the other places, before finally heading to Tanah Lot, others specifically reserve a day to watch it. It’s well-known for attracting both locals as well as tourists.

‘’No, candlelight dinners aren’t the most romantic kind of date plan’’— this is exactly what you are going to say once you try a dinner date amidst the paddy fields of Tegallalang. It’s a sort of picnic spot in the paralleled rice fields, a picture of beauty and tranquility. The restaurants in and around bring lip-smacking delicacies to their customers. Imagine taking a stroll hand-in-hand with your partner, admiring the beauty of nature.

Visiting Bali and not trying the jet-ski ride is similar to having a cake without any icing, frosting, filling, or glaze. Once you get trained by the professionals over there, you can ride on the crystal-clear waters of Nusa Dua. All the splashes on the body and then playing in the water with each other, will be so much fun, isn’t it?

Getting inked together is a powerful expression of showing love for one another and this has been going on for quite a long time in Bali tour. Couples often head out to any tattoo studio and get tattooed there. While some prefer getting the names of each other on their bodies, some pick unique designs that symbolize their true love. You can be as creative as you want as some tattoo studios offer customized designs as well!

Tegal Wangi Beach has been named after a temple. It’s set on top of limestone that overlooks the breathtaking beach and offers such striking dynamics and landscapes that are worth exploring with your partner. Additionally, you can try a natural hot bath over there. The intimate moments that you can enjoy with your partner once you are inside the water will stay with you forever!

You can experience the dramatic and romantic honeymoon destinations in Bali on a sunrise climb to Mount Batur, which is an active volcano i.e located 1700 meters above sea level. With the phenomenal views from its top, hot springs, and eye-gripping crater lake, you will be left flabbergasted!

So what are you waiting for? If you have been spooling the list of names of various destinations where you wish to go for your honeymoon, then Bali should feature among the top three names. Gear up for an amazing and awesome experience. Happy honeymooning!
